decision_summary: Proceed to a bounded C106 Qwen/VL teacher feature-distillation route. Do not repeat C097 SigLIP-only training from the C104 signal, and do not train on local-real C102 candidates until manual or external annotation provides enough confirmed positives.

base_model_or_checkpoint.student_runtime_surface: native ComfyUI reference-control adapter path, initially as a Qwen-teacher feature bridge or Qwen-target projection probe
do_not_start_from: C104 SigLIP-only token probe as a sufficient training signal
C102 local-real candidates as direct positives

train_or_probe_command_surface.c106_first_step: Build a Qwen-teacher distillation manifest from C097 train rows, C087 hard-shape target evidence, and explicit negatives.
train_or_probe_command_surface.c106_probe_before_training: Score teacher-positive versus explicit-negative separability in Qwen/VL teacher feature space and in the student feature projection space; block if the route cannot beat C104's weak margin and C098's generation ceiling.
train_or_probe_command_surface.training_if_probe_passes: Run a bounded Qwen-teacher feature bridge or target-projection training stage with heldout rows excluded, then evaluate in the C098-style hard-shape generation gate.

visual_focus: avoid collapse into green adult humanoid portrait

stop_conditions: Any heldout row appears in the C106 training manifest.
Qwen teacher feature probe does not exceed C104 margin or cannot reach AUC 0.85.
Student projection remains below margin 0.03 or AUC 0.8 after the bounded probe.
Training loss is non-finite or checkpoint loadability fails.
Generation repeats C098/C104 green humanoid collapse or produces blank-like outputs.
no_heldout_leakage_policy: C106 may use C097 train rows, explicit negatives, C087 train hard-shape target evidence, and C104/C098 train-only artifacts. heldout01/05/07 and clean32 heldout rows remain evaluation-only and must not enter training rows.

rejected_routes.reason: C104 best SigLIP margin 0.0199753408 and AUC 0.7228954082 are below the pass threshold; C098 also failed to beat the Qwen baseline.
It directly addresses the C102 zero-positive blocker but requires new manual/external labels before autonomous training can run.
C098 trained successfully but stayed below C087, and C104 did not find enough pre-training feature signal.
